stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents.
substantive: She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the national interest.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of her constituents. She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the national interest. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “If I lose an election doing what I think is right, then so be it.”
